name: Personal Memory
description: Remember, search, show, and forget durable personal information about the user.

toolDeclarations.name: remember_user_fact
toolDeclarations.description: Save durable personal memory when the user explicitly states something to remember, such as their name, preferences, CV details, important people, schedule facts, or favorite music.

key.description: Stable short key for the memory, such as user:self, favorite:song, contact:john, or cv:work.

value.description: The fact or summary to remember.

toolDeclarations.name: show_user_memory
toolDeclarations.description: Show remembered personal information. Use when the user asks what you remember, asks about known preferences, contacts, music, schedule, or profile.

toolDeclarations.name: forget_user_memory
toolDeclarations.description: Delete personal memory matching a query. Use when the user asks you to forget, remove, clear, or delete something you remember.

query.description: Text to match in memory key or value.
